task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Apple Watch Series 8 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $399.00 and wholesale is $279.00. Product features: Smartwatch with temperature sensing and crash detection. Reference: https://www.apple.com/apple-watch-series-8/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Apple Watch Series 8. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Apple Watch Series 8. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
